title: Post-spinal headache documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting the dural-puncture context, headache timing and features, associated symptoms, focused history and examination, and atypical or severe neurological features without automatically diagnosing PDPH.

source.title: Statement on Post-Dural Puncture Headache Management
source.population: Predominantly obstetric patients with recognised or suspected unintentional dural puncture or post-dural puncture headache.
source.setting: Neuraxial anesthesia follow-up, postpartum assessment, discharge, and post-discharge follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for documented headache history, focused examination, atypical or severe features, and follow-up after suspected or confirmed dural puncture. It is only partial for a broad non-obstetric post-spinal-headache workflow, and treatment recommendations are not mapped.

assessment.text: Supports documented follow-up until symptom resolution, brief neurological assessment, and verbal or written contact advice as clinician-completed actions without generating treatment.
assessment.rationale: The follow-up section supports recording follow-up and contact advice only when actually arranged or discussed by the clinician.
